title: Everything Refined
description: The definitive MC 2.0 modpack. Everything Refined improves on almost every aspect of the game, including farming, combat, exploration, graphics, and much more!
body:
Everything Refined is a modpack that aims to overhaul every essential aspect of the game. From combat to crafting and exploration, everything benefits from new mechanics that are easy to understand for new players and bring significant depth for experienced ones.



Spoiler Expand your line of sight with [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) and enjoy a next-generation graphical experience with [Complementary: Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) and [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations). ![distant and expansive landscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e23a1de9f881cd9a447a132f2ee0bd04da58fb8.jpeg) New animations and sound effects have entered your inventory. With [Smooth Swapping](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping) and [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound), items slide into place, making inventory management as satisfying as possible.




Spoiler Get the most performant gaming experience possible with the best optimization mods, such as: - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - ...and many others




Spoiler Have you ever wanted Minecraft to have [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)? It's time to pick up some [Soulslike Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry) and get into the fight! Hop into third person with [Shoulder Surfing Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/shoulder-surfing-reloaded) and fight [Mobs of Mythology](https://modrinth.com/mod/mobs-of-mythology) equipped with your trusty [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts) and [Mythic Charms](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-charms). Play as a [Wizard](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards), [Rogue](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors), [Paladin](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests), [Archer](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers), or however you want. ![armors for multiple rpg classes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ce573e2d50c907674d5737089c9ab7fe072080b.jpeg) No matter which path you choose, [Bosses of Mass Destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction) are waiting for you. But don't be scared because this pack has been created to be both challenging and balanced for new players. By default, you will not lose your items when you die, but a [Death XP Penalty](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-xp-penalty) is imposed instead. This is easily configurable by just disabling the keepInventory gamerule. As your enemies are now [Eldritch Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/eldritch-mobs), [Mutant Monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters), and [Ultris Bosses](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ultris), not just regular zombies and skeletons, some adjustments had to be made to make things fair for you. For example, mob spawners have been [Limited](https://modrinth.com/mod/limitedspawners) to 5 spawns, and powerful weapons, armor, and magical spells have been introduced. ![weapons and armor items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aaaa0c70bbcfdb2cf9507ad6e13d98ab47a773f.jpeg)




Spoiler [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) brings a new way of cooking meals to the game, and [Spice of Life: Valheim Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/spice-of-life-valheim-edition) makes them enjoyable to consume. ![a kitchen with a cutting board and some pans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83e8de4e2f6bea803dae3e516226fd35803054ba.jpeg) Just make sure to bring your fishing rod with you for the ultimate catch, with [Fish of Thieves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves) and [Hybrid Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/hybrid-aquatic). ![a fish in the bottom of the ocean](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30912ae9392487b577634f83b229cb7e81664a4d.jpeg)




Spoiler Connect all your chests and inventories with [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) and easily browse what's craftable with [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)'s recipes and recipe trees. ![interconnected chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6689c720402562695da3ea3aabe29ecdb8ad795.jpeg)




Spoiler Visit [Camps, Castles, and Carriages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/camps_castles_carriages), as this pack includes many new and [Immersive Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/immersive-structures) for you to explore. Vanilla structures have also been upgraded with the power of [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Villages](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village). ![an elaborate village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e971913b51c355828b55d7f0b894ab8e96993268.jpeg) The [Let's Do](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-api) series of mods includes new biomes with their own mechanics, items, and blocks for you to discover and master on your journey. [Satisfyu's](https://modrinth.com/user/satisfyu) amazing additions, together with [YUNG's](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG), completely redefine the experience of playing Minecraft. ![a custom beach biome with palm trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8ecc440359f9a4c98492ce770b3ad73e6e33bb7.jpeg) New forms of travel have been introduced. Soar the skies with your [Hang Glider](https://modrinth.com/mod/hang-glider) or discover [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) to unlock teleportation. ![A waystone as a floating eye on top of a pillar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/607593a0081d1cca93de53bdc23d55ad7fa1466d.jpeg)




Spoiler Say hello to being able to [Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-sorting) your inventory and [Trash](https://modrinth.com/mod/trashslot) the items you don't need. You no longer need to walk up to collect the ores you just mined when you can [Pick Up Widely](https://modrinth.com/mod/pickupwidely-fabric). [Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on) helps you organize your chests, [Trees fall](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) from the hits of your axe, and crops are collected and replanted with a simple right click, enabling you to [Harvest with ease](https://modrinth.com/mod/harvest-with-ease).
